name: io.github.wizkid17/mythic-index-mcp
title: Mythic Index
description: MTG card prices, deck analysis, and investment intelligence — 19 tools over the Mythic Index API.

environmentVariables.name: MYTHIC_INDEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Mythic Index API. Defaults to the bundled public read-only key.

environmentVariables.name: MYTHIC_INDEX_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Mythic Index API. Defaults to https://api.mythic-index.com.
